_comment: EXAMPLE: any OMP provider/model as a reviewer. RV resolves seats through OMP's own model registry — any provider+model your omp session can use works as a reviewer. To find valid ids: run /model inside omp (interactive picker of authenticated models), or read ~/.omp/agent/models.yml for custom providers, then /rv doctor to verify.
_rule: the reviewer family MUST differ from your primary model's family — RV enforces this live and skips same-family seats

reviewers.family: <model-family, e.g. qwen, glm, moonshot, deepseek, claude, gpt>
